system.flavor: Detach shadowy strings that hook into the soul aether of your target, dragging them where you will.
system.effect: Mark [X]: Mark a character or summon in range. At their turn start, pull your target 1d3+2 spaces toward you with phasing. This ability does not require line of sight. If your target is a foe, for every ally, object, or allied summon your character passes through during this movement, your target takes 2 damage. A foe can take a save at the end of their turn to remove this mark.
